title: Cuneiform Tablet #0689: Hellenistic Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
